pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: coverletter.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: My Portfolio
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  toc: true
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  editor:
    markdown:
      wrap: 72
  theme: cosmo
  title: My Coverletter
